case_title: STANDARD FISHERIES CORP VS EAST COAST SEAFOOD OF PHOENIX INC

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT EAST COAST SEAFOOD OF PHOENIX INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $192.00 FILED BY STANDARD FISHERIES CORP AS TO DEFENDANT EAST COAST SEAFOOD OF PHOENIX INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO ALFRED OLSEN RETURNED NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STANDARD FISHERIES CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EAST COAST SEAFOOD OF PHOENIX INC $192.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $204.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
